description: Cross-SDK canonical byte-pin vectors for the EATP-08 v1.1 algorithm identifier. The conformant wire encoding is a top-level `alg_id` string member; under JCS (RFC 8785) it serialises to `{"alg_id":"<token>"}`. Both kailash-py and kailash-rs MUST produce byte-identical `canonical_member` and identical `expected_sha256` for every registry token. kailash-py is the canonical AUTHOR (first SDK to implement EATP-08 v1.1); kailash-rs VENDORS this file byte-for-byte as part of its eatp-v1 adoption (#1315) per rules/cross-sdk-inspection.md Rule 4a. The `expected_sha256` is the SHA-256 of the UTF-8 `canonical_member` bytes (ASCII-only; serialize_for_signing uses ensure_ascii=True).

non_conformant.name: deprecated_pre_registry_literal_bare_top_level_string
non_conformant.decode_with_pre_adoption_witness: reject: unsupported-algorithm (a bare top-level-string literal is an unregistered token, NOT a D2d form; a witness MUST NOT rescue it)
non_conformant.reason: EATP-08 v1.1.1 / mint#26: a top-level alg_id string equal to the deprecated literal is registry-matched (§5.1 step 2), is not a registry token, and is rejected with unsupported-algorithm with or without a witness. The two D2d forms are the nested-object alg_id value and unsigned `algorithm` metadata (§4.5), never a bare top-level string. Preserves the §3.3 top-level-string-token invariant the anti-strip design (§4.4/V6) depends on.

non_conformant.name: nested_pre_registry_object
non_conformant.reason: pre-registry nested-object encoding; accepted only via the D2d witnessed legacy path, mapped to eatp-v1

non_conformant.name: missing_alg_id_post_adoption
non_conformant.decode_with_pre_adoption_witness: accept as eatp-v1 only when the record carries the pre-registry algorithm metadata + a pre-adoption witness
non_conformant.reason: EATP-08 §4.2 (D2b): a post-adoption record without alg_id MUST be rejected, NOT default-filled

non_conformant.name: unregistered_token
non_conformant.decode_with_pre_adoption_witness: reject: unsupported-algorithm (witness does not rescue a non-pre-registry unknown token)
non_conformant.reason: EATP-08 §3.3: an unregistered token MUST emit unsupported-algorithm and MUST NOT fall through to eatp-v1
